prompt: A polished, high-end product photography scene showcases a confident young woman with smooth dark hair, dressed in a soft pink textured top, standing against a minimalist grey studio backdrop. In the foreground, a sleek Ellie Beauty spray bottle takes center focus, sharply detailed with a reflective metallic label that shifts between green and gold tones. The composition is brought to life with dynamic lime-green motion streaks and floating rounded tags that call out key benefits such as “high-shine finish” and “heat defense up to 450°F” in bold, modern sans-serif typography. Soft, diffused studio lighting enhances the model’s natural features while producing crisp reflections along the bottle’s surface. In the upper corner, a striking lime-green headline poses the question, “What does it do?”, tying the layout together with a fresh, contemporary advertising feel and a shallow depth of field that keeps both the product and the model’s expression clear and compelling.
